narrative:
Lima 5B (precinct in Allen County) has 499 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.2 percentage points.
